title: EU and UK demand Israel stop surge in West Bank settler violence since Iran war
summary_full: Six Palestinians have been killed during attacks by settlers in the West Bank since the start of Israel's war, the UN says.
summary_public: Six Palestinians have been killed during attacks by settlers in the West Bank since the start of Israel's war, the UN says.
